info.title: GMRAG API
info.description: GMRAG 2.0 HTTP API. Authenticated routes require `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`. Tenant-scoped routes under `/tenants/{tid}/...` also require header `X-Tenant-ID` matching the path `{tid}`. List endpoints return full result sets (no pagination) unless noted.

get.summary: List every tenant the authenticated user belongs to.

delete.summary: Delete a tenant and cascade its data (owner-only).

get.summary: List ACL grants on a resource (viewer-gated).

404.description: Resource not found or no viewer access

get.summary: Recent audit log entries, newest first (max 100, owner-only).
List chat sessions visible to the caller.

post.summary: Create a chat session owned by the caller.

post.description:
Response is `text/event-stream` with JSON `data:` lines matching [`ChatSseEvent`].
In-stream failures use `{ "type": "error", "code": "...", "message": "..." }`
(not the HTTP `{ "error": { ... } }` envelope). Codes include `stream-failed`
and `persist-failed`. Pre-stream validation errors still use the standard HTTP
error JSON. Swagger UI has limited SSE support; use curl or EventSource for
full stream testing.

404.description: Session not found or no viewer access

get.summary: T84D Phase 3.2 — list messages for a chat session (viewer-gated).

404.description: Session not found or no viewer access

get.summary: List documents visible to the caller.

requestBody.description: Fields: file (binary), visibility (shared|private), workspace_id, optional title

get.summary: Document metadata and first chunks (viewer-gated, max 50 chunks).

404.description: Not found or no viewer access

get.summary: List members of the current tenant.

post.summary: Invite a user to the tenant by email (owner-only).

get.summary: Read tenant LLM / BYOK settings (owner-only, masked API key).
List workspaces in the current tenant.

post.summary: Create a workspace in the current tenant.

patch.summary: Update a workspace name and slug.

404.description: Workspace not found or not a member
Workspace not found or no access

post.summary: Add a member to a workspace.

delete.summary: Remove a member from a workspace.

get.summary: Return the authenticated user's profile and tenant memberships.

ChatMessageItem.description: T84D Phase 3.2 — single chat message (history endpoint).

ChatSseEvent.description:
SSE `data:` line payload (tagged JSON).

In-stream errors (`type: "error"`) use flat `{ type, code, message }` — not
the HTTP `{ error: { code, message } }` envelope. Known codes: `stream-failed`,
`persist-failed`.

id.description: Opaque OpenFGA tuple identifier, suitable only for `DELETE /acl/{grant_id}`.

ErrorBody.description: Machine-readable error code (kebab-case) and human-readable message.

created_at.description: OpenFGA direct tuples do not expose creation timestamps.

id.description: Opaque OpenFGA tuple identifier, suitable only for `DELETE /acl/{grant_id}`.

TenantMemberRole.description:
`tenant_members.role` vocabulary: `owner` > `admin` > `member`.

`owner` is the highest role. `admin` is a valid stored role but Phase 0
grants it no new authorization powers. `member` is the default role.

UploadDocumentForm.description: Multipart form fields for document upload.

WorkspaceMemberRole.description:
`workspace_members.role` vocabulary: `owner` > `admin` > `member`.

Same semantics as [`TenantMemberRole`] but for workspace membership.

bearer_auth.description: Keycloak OIDC access token. Use Authorize and paste the JWT (with or without the `Bearer ` prefix).

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Chat sessions and RAG SSE streaming
